use_cases: Primary action trigger for form submissions in web applications
Interactive navigation elements with hover and focus states
Destructive action buttons with distinct red variant styling
Icon-only compact buttons for toolbars and dense interfaces
Accessible keyboard-navigable controls with focus indicators
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Features hover glow effects, keyboard navigation support via focus-visible outlines, and disabled states. The minimalist flat design includes subtle shadows for depth and works across all platforms with responsive sizing.
